title: HD Sword
description: A texturepack that makes the diamond sword into something much more smoother to look at
body:
Have you ever wanted to PvP with a diamond sword that doesn't disgusting. well then this pack is for you!
Pack contains a smoother/ HD sword and is far more realistic than the standard minecraft sword.

 * HD sword


```
THIS PACK ONLY AFFECTS THE DIAMOND SWORD
```
